cd /workspaces/DAGent-t && bash tools/autonomous-factory/agent-commit.sh all "test(storefront): add comprehensive unit tests for product-quick-view feature ↵ - QuickViewModal: 17 tests covering loadin

messages: Now let me explore the existing source code and test infrastructure.
Test files already exist. Let me read the source components and existing tests, then run them.
Good, I have a clear picture. Let me now run the existing tests to see their status.

All 26 tests pass. Let me check the spec requirements against the existing tests to identify any gaps. I see the spec requires some additional test cases:  1. **QuickViewModal**: `imageSize="sm"` prop verification (spec #12), focus trap test (spec #14) 2. **ProductTile**: Semi-transparent background test (spec #12), full-width positioning test (spec #13) 3. Branch coverage on product-tile is 75% — line 28 (`product?.name` fallback) is uncovered  Let me add the missing tests.
Now let me add the missing ProductTile tests and improve branch coverage:
Now let me run the tests to verify everything passes:
All 35 tests pass with **100% coverage** across all metrics (statements, branches, functions, lines). Let me commit the changes.
Commit successful. Let me report the outcome.

reportedOutcome.docNote: 35 Jest tests (17 QuickViewModal + 18 ProductTile) covering all spec test cases with 100% branch/line/statement/function coverage. Tests mock commerce-sdk-react hooks, ProductView, and base ProductTile to isolate unit behavior.
